context: Tests whether swiftui-webkit keeps embedded web content, Safari-style browsing, OAuth, platform browse-out behavior, and WKWebView fallback boundaries separate.

checklist.name: Embedded WebKit default
checklist.description: Uses `WebView` with `WebPage` for app-owned embedded content that needs page state, JavaScript, navigation policy, loading control, or custom URL scheme resources.

checklist.name: Authentication boundary
checklist.description: Uses `ASWebAuthenticationSession` for GitHub OAuth and explicitly avoids implementing OAuth in embedded `WebView`, `WKWebView`, or `SFSafariViewController`.

checklist.name: Safari-style browsing boundary
checklist.description: Limits `SFSafariViewController` to iOS/iPadOS Safari-style modal browsing for external sites when the app does not need content interaction or customization.

checklist.name: macOS and visionOS browse-out
checklist.description: Routes macOS and visionOS external browse-out behavior to `openURL` or the platform default browser rather than presenting `SFSafariViewController` as the cross-platform solution.

checklist.name: WKWebView fallback
checklist.description: Keeps `WKWebView` only as an explicit fallback for back-deployment or a required capability not covered by the SwiftUI-facing WebKit API.
